name: geometry-workflow
description: Geometry sets (nodes, edges, polygons) describe surfaces and structures used to guide block cutting and selection in 3DEC, and to import external CAD/measured geometry. Distinct from the blocks themselves — geometry is a construction/selection aid.
common_patterns: geometry import '<file>.stl' — bring in an external surface
block cut ... — cut blocks along joints/planes (imported geometry guides placement)
range ... — geometry-based selection scopes downstream commands
notes: Geometry is a construction aid; it does not itself create blocks or zones.
Use 'block densify' to refine cut blocks where finer resolution is needed.
